name: each emitted rule carries a sha256 content_hash and a provenance section pinning it to the source-id
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-o04-$$; mkdir -p $OUT && cat > $OUT/src.md <<'MD'
# Framework

## Encrypt at rest
All data must be encrypted.
MD
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --url $OUT/src.md --target-namespace us-government --framework-id o04 --source-id o04src --authoritative-publisher X --out-dir $OUT/out --dry-run > stdout.txt 2>/dev/null; grep -qE 'content_hash: sha256:[0-9a-f]{64}' stdout.txt && grep -q 'source: o04src' stdout.txt && echo single-url-emits-provenance-and-content-hash 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
